isolation.notes: Used a fresh isolated HOME under /tmp, exported ORT_DYLIB_PATH for all real local-mode commands, created project-A/project-B inside that HOME, and treated the shared release binary as read-only.

assertions.reason: With a fresh isolated HOME and ORT_DYLIB_PATH set, vera index --local completed successfully for project-A, created /tmp/vera-local-mode-runtime-kdbq_zrz/home/project-A/.vera, and populated $HOME/.vera/models with 3 files (264347808 bytes total).
VERA_LOCAL=1 vera search and vera search --local both succeeded against the same indexed project-A and returned equivalent JSON results for the same query.

Re-indexing project-B with the same isolated HOME reused the existing $HOME/.vera/models cache: the command succeeded, no download/fetch text appeared, and the cache file inventory was unchanged before vs after project-B.

The isolated $HOME/.vera/models cache contains quantized ONNX artifacts (2 model_quantized.onnx files, 561007694 bytes total) and no full-precision model.onnx files. Source inspection also points local inference code at model_quantized.onnx only.
